text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While I'm walking around town on my day off...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Fine. You done yet or what? Let's head
back already.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No can do! ♪ We've only just started our ramen
tour!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: We've already been to three restaurants...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Those were just warmups! You said you'd escort
me, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You've got to play along, or I miiight just decide
not to give you my data after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch. I should've been more specific about the
deal...

text_block_list.name: Pedestrian A
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, it's Air Shakur! She looks even scarier in
the flesh...

text_block_list.name: Pedestrian B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, she's always on edge. I don't envy
whoever's racing her next, 'cause she looks ready
to fly off the handle again.

text_block_list.name: Pedestrian A
text_block_list.text: Oh crap. Think she can hear us?

text_block_list.name: Pedestrian B
text_block_list.text: Probably. Let's get out of here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Shakur. I didn't understand all of those
words. Did they mean you look strong?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
No, idiot. They're bad-mouthing me. Saying that
I'm an antisocial freak who's gonna get someone
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What?! Really? That's so rude! I'm going to go set
them straight!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Don't be stupid. There's no point.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But... doesn't it make you sad?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: As if. Why should I care? Not my problem.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Background noise like that isn't worth factoring
into anything, so I just filter it all out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Sides, they'll shut up if I win enough. So, just
leave 'em be.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see... Shakur, you really are noble.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh? How did you get that from what I just said?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You keep working towards your goals, no matter
what. I think that's really noble.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But if the "noise" ever gets you down, the sound
of slurping ramen is sure to drown it out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll always be happy to join you! No matter the
place!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You just want to eat ramen! ...Hmph, I can't
stomach people like you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I can stomach pretty much anything! I'll
prove it to you at the next place!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's not what I meant... Ugh.
